column1: # Catalog of NOx point sources v2.0
# Covered time range: Jan 2020 to Dec 2020
# Version 2 of the catalog provides a fundamental update compared to version 1.
# Several improvements have been implemented resulting in generally higher and
# A detailed description of the dataset is to be submitted to ESSD.
# Column 1: Rank of NOx point source
# Column 2: Latitude [degree North] of point source
# Column 3: Longitude [degree East] of point source
# Column 6: Number of months (within the considered time range)
#           where significant emissions could be detected.
# Column 7: Combustion power plants above 100 MW within 15 km
#           No entry if no match to GPPD was found.
#           but extended by entries from v1.2 if missing in 1.3
#           No entry if no match to WCD was found.
